text: 2026-07-09 decision (Brad): Windows acceleration is IN SCOPE for v0.1.0. Route: vendor Khronos OpenCL + CLBlast C headers, remove OS_type: unix, refactor opencl_bridge.c to runtime dynamic loading (LoadLibrary/dlopen) of OpenCL and CLBlast — no link-time deps, missing lib => available=FALSE with reason. Add consent-gated amatrix_install_clblast() fetching official CLBlast release DLL into tools::R_user_dir. CI proves build+graceful degradation (runners have no GPU); certification needs one manual run on physical Windows GPU hardware. Same refactor fixes the clGetDeviceIDs check abort (bd-01KX33B03AHS382F70FNAE07F2). See planning_docs/plan-release-readiness-2026-07.md Phase W.
